name: Energized Shield (Major)
description:
This minor reinforcing steel shield (Hardness 8, HP 64, BT 32) is lined with pale silver that glows when struck. Whenever you use the reaction, this shield becomes energized for 1 round.

Activate—Energized Blast 1 (force, manipulate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Requirements The shield is energized

Effect You direct the stored energy into a short blast, targeting a creature within 15 feet. The target takes ] damage ( save).
